headline: Can Simpler Pricing Improve Kroger's Customer Retention?
summary: KR is simplifying its pricing strategy to strengthen value perception while funding investments through efficiency gains.

raw.headline: Can Simpler Pricing Improve Kroger's Customer Retention?
raw.summary: KR is simplifying its pricing strategy to strengthen value perception while funding investments through efficiency gains.

headline: Murray's Cave-Aged Cheeses Bring Home Six Medals at the 2026 American Cheese Society Awards
summary: The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) and Murray's Cheese announced today that six cheeses from its renowned Cave Aged Cheese program received honors at the 2026 American Cheese Society (ACS) Judging & Competition Awards, one of the most respected and competitive accolades in American artisan cheese.

raw.headline: Murray's Cave-Aged Cheeses Bring Home Six Medals at the 2026 American Cheese Society Awards

(NYSE: KR) and Murray's Cheese announced today that six cheeses from its renowned Cave Aged Cheese program received honors at the 2026 American Cheese Society (ACS) Judging & Competition Awards, one of the most respected and competitive accolades in American artisan cheese.

headline: Kroger: Buy This Defensive Dividend Grower While It's Undervalued
summary: Kroger stock looks undervalued at 11.2x forward P/E, with private label, digital, and retail media growth, plus dividends/buybacks. Learn more about KR stock here.
